messages.author: 🦦 Hilton Travis SMBI
messages.text: T Beam (original) uses SX1276 which is poo on narrow bandwidths, is poo locking to a frequency correctly, and is poo on longer messages.
messages.content_html: T Beam (original) uses SX1276 which is poo on narrow bandwidths, is poo locking to a frequency correctly, and is poo on longer messages.
